text:
There was a girl named Bella who loved butterflies. One summer she decided to make a collection, keeping them in jars. She visited every garden she could find, picking out the prettiest wild ones.

The biggest challenge came when she caught a snowy owl. She couldn meticuously cleaned it. But when she put it back, it flew away.

That night her cat wanted a warm feather toy. She never could get that owl back.

So she adopted the biggest starling she could find. It didn’t like birds.

But then Bella took it bird Watching. She took it to cliffs. She fed it flies.

Her starling liked flies. Maybe the owl could fly that way. Bella took it to the hills.

But the owl flew back. They became the best pair in the whole woods.
